name: Best Auto
description_short: Best Auto of Arizona is a used car dealership with two Phoenix-area locations offering dealer financing for all credit types on pre-owned vehicles priced from under $5,999.
description_long:
Best Auto of Arizona is a used car dealership with two locations in the greater Phoenix metropolitan area — 5017 W Glendale Ave in Glendale and 1620 N 19th Ave in Phoenix. The company markets itself as a customer-first operation serving buyers across a wide range of financial situations, with a particular emphasis on accessibility for those with challenged credit histories. Their platform is powered by DealerSync and their inventory spans model years 2004 through 2022.

The dealership sells pre-owned cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans from over 19 manufacturers including Ford, Dodge, Chevrolet, Ram, Jeep, Honda, Toyota, Kia, and Hyundai, among others. Pricing begins under $5,999 for entry-level vehicles and reaches approximately $24,679 on the high end for commercial trucks such as Ford Super Duty models. All inventory is described as passing a full mechanical inspection before sale. Buyers can filter inventory online by make, model, year, and price range, and submit a secured credit application directly on the site with promised pre-approval in seconds.

Best Auto's primary differentiator is its emphasis on accessible dealer financing — advertising 'easy and quick financing options for all types of credit.' This positions them as a practical option for buyers who have difficulty qualifying through traditional banks or credit unions. Both locations operate Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM, and maintain active social media presence on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter. Customer reviews featured on the site are uniformly positive at 5.0 stars, with multiple reviewers specifically crediting the dealership for working with difficult credit situations when other options were unavailable.

Consumers should understand that Best Auto is a used car dealership, not a personal loan provider. Any financing obtained here is vehicle-specific — tied to a car purchase — and not a general-purpose cash loan. Interest rates, APR, and loan terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website. The dealership's own disclaimer states that 'all rates and offers are dependent on bank approval.' Buyers should obtain competing loan quotes from their own bank or credit union before visiting and treat dealer financing as one option, not the default.
pros: Financing available for all credit types, including challenged or limited credit history
Two accessible Phoenix-metro locations (Glendale and Phoenix)
Inventory spans 19+ vehicle makes across a wide price range ($5,999–$24,679)
All vehicles undergo a full mechanical inspection before sale
Online inventory browsing with filters for make, model, year, and price
Fast online pre-approval process via secured credit application
Six-day operating hours (Mon–Sat 9 AM–7 PM) at both locations
cons: No APR, interest rates, or loan terms disclosed on the website
Some vehicles listed as 'Call for Price' with no online pricing
Inventory skews older — majority of stock is 2008–2018 model years
Financing is auto loan-only and tied to vehicle purchase — no cash or general-purpose lending
best_for: Phoenix or Glendale area residents needing a used vehicle with in-house financing
Buyers with bad credit or prior repossessions who have been declined elsewhere
First-time buyers who want guided dealer financing rather than sourcing their own loan
diagnosis: Best Auto of Arizona is best suited for Phoenix-area buyers with imperfect credit who need a vehicle and want dealer financing under one roof. The core caveat is that this is a used car dealership — not a lending institution — so financing terms are opaque until you're at the dealership, and all rates depend on third-party bank approval. Note: no category in this directory perfectly matches a BHPH-style dealership; 'personal-loans' is the closest available but consumers should not expect a general cash loan.
services: Pre-owned car, truck, SUV, and van sales
Dealer/in-house financing for all credit types
Online secured credit application with instant pre-approval
Full mechanical inspection on all inventory
Online inventory browsing with make/model/year/price filters
In-person vehicle viewings and test drives (2 locations)
Customer support via phone at each location
